req.title: Submit leave request
req.statement: A full-time employee shall be able to submit a leave request for between 1 and 30 business days; requests spanning more than 30 days require hr-admin approval.
error_pathways: 422 when request exceeds 30 days without hr-admin

doc.reasoning: The requirement defines a leave-request submission flow with three key partitions: valid requests (1-30 business days), requests exceeding 30 days without hr-admin approval, and invalid date/overlap combinations. BVA targets the 1-day minimum, 30-day maximum, and 31-day threshold. NEG covers start_date > end_date (400), overlapping leave (409), and >30 days without hr-admin (422). STC covers the state change from no-request to pending. DT captures the hr-admin approval branching rule. Each test uses a fresh authenticated session fixture and a teardown hook to delete created resources, ensuring idempotency.

tests.name: test_submit_valid_leave_request_within_30_days
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
No overlapping leave requests exist for the selected dates
SMTP stub is active to capture notification emails
actions: Navigate to /leave-requests/new
Fill start_date with next_monday() business date
Fill end_date with start_date + 9 business days (10-day request)
Submit the form
expected: HTTP 201 or redirect to confirmation page
Leave request record created in DB with status=pending
Notification email delivered to employee mailbox
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date

def test_submit_valid_leave_request_within_30_days(
    authenticated_page,   # <fixture>: Playwright page with full-time employee session
    api_client,           # <fixture>: requests.Session with auth headers
    smtp_stub,            # <fixture>: captures outbound emails
    delete_leave_on_teardown,  # <fixture>: collects IDs for cleanup
):
    start, end = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=1), <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=10)
    page = authenticated_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-leave']")
    page.wait_for_url("**/leave-requests/**")

    resp = api_client.get("/api/leave-requests", params={"start": start, "end": end})
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    records = resp.json()["data"]
    assert len(records) == 1
    leave_id = records[0]["id"]
    delete_leave_on_teardown(leave_id)

    assert records[0]["status"] == "pending"
    assert <helper_fn>.manager_notification_exists(leave_id, api_client)
    assert smtp_stub.has_email_for(records[0]["employee_email"])

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_start_date_after_end_date_returns_400
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
actions: Navigate to /leave-requests/new
Fill start_date with next_monday() + 5 business days
Fill end_date with next_monday() (earlier than start_date)
Submit the form
expected: Inline validation error message displayed on UI
No leave request record created in DB
trace: R-WEB-057: error pathway 400 when start_date > end_date
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_start_date_after_end_date_returns_400(
    authenticated_page,  # <fixture>
    api_client,          # <fixture>
):
    start = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=6)
    end   = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=1)
    page  = authenticated_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-leave']")

    error_el = page.locator("[data-testid='date-error']").first
    assert error_el.is_visible()

    resp = api_client.post(
        "/api/leave-requests",
        json={"start_date": start.isoformat(), "end_date": end.isoformat()},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    assert "start_date" in resp.json().get("errors", {})

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_exactly_30_business_days_accepted
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
No overlapping leave requests exist for the selected 30-day range
actions: Navigate to /leave-requests/new
Fill start_date with next_monday() business date
Fill end_date with start_date + 29 business days (exactly 30 business days inclusive)
Submit the form
expected: HTTP 201 or redirect to confirmation page
Leave request created with status=pending (no hr-admin approval required)
trace: R-WEB-057: upper boundary of 30 business days, no hr-admin required
R-WEB-057: BVA upper boundary on valid range
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_exactly_30_business_days_accepted(
    authenticated_page,
    api_client,
    smtp_stub,
    delete_leave_on_teardown,
):
    start = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=1)
    end   = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=30)  # 30 inclusive business days
    page  = authenticated_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-leave']")
    page.wait_for_url("**/leave-requests/**")

    resp = api_client.get("/api/leave-requests", params={"start": start, "end": end})
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    records = resp.json()["data"]
    assert len(records) == 1
    leave = records[0]
    delete_leave_on_teardown(leave["id"])

    assert leave["status"] == "pending"
    assert leave.get("requires_hr_admin") is False
    assert <helper_fn>.manager_notification_exists(leave["id"], api_client)

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_31_business_days_without_hr_admin_returns_422
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee (not hr-admin)
No overlapping leave requests exist for the selected dates
actions: Navigate to /leave-requests/new
Fill start_date with next_monday() business date
Fill end_date with start_date + 30 business days (31 business days inclusive)
Submit the form without hr-admin token
expected: UI displays error requiring hr-admin approval
No leave request record committed with status=pending
trace: R-WEB-057: error pathway 422 when request exceeds 30 days without hr-admin
R-WEB-057: DT rule - duration > 30 AND actor != hr-admin => reject
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_31_business_days_without_hr_admin_returns_422(
    authenticated_page,
    api_client,
):
    start = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=1)
    end   = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=31)  # 31 inclusive business days
    page  = authenticated_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-leave']")

    error_el = page.locator("[data-testid='hr-admin-approval-error']").first
    assert error_el.is_visible()

    resp = api_client.post(
        "/api/leave-requests",
        json={"start_date": start.isoformat(), "end_date": end.isoformat()},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body.get("code") == "HR_ADMIN_APPROVAL_REQUIRED"

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_overlapping_existing_leave_returns_409
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
An approved leave request already exists for next_monday + 2 to next_monday + 6
actions: Seed an existing leave record via API for the overlapping window
Navigate to /leave-requests/new
Fill start_date with next_monday() + 4 business days (overlaps seeded record)
Fill end_date with next_monday() + 8 business days
Submit the form
expected: UI displays conflict error message referencing existing leave
No new leave request record created
trace: R-WEB-057: error pathway 409 when overlapping existing leave
R-WEB-057: STC - transition from approved-leave state blocks new overlapping submission
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_overlapping_existing_leave_returns_409(
    authenticated_page,
    api_client,
    delete_leave_on_teardown,
):
    # Seed overlapping approved leave
    seed_start = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=2)
    seed_end   = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=6)
    seed_resp  = api_client.post(
        "/api/leave-requests",
        json={"start_date": seed_start.isoformat(), "end_date": seed_end.isoformat(),
              "_force_status": "approved"},
    )
    assert seed_resp.status_code == 201
    delete_leave_on_teardown(seed_resp.json()["id"])

    new_start = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=4)  # overlaps seed
    new_end   = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=8)
    page      = authenticated_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", new_start.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", new_end.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-leave']")

    error_el = page.locator("[data-testid='overlap-error']").first
    assert error_el.is_visible()

    resp = api_client.post(
        "/api/leave-requests",
        json={"start_date": new_start.isoformat(), "end_date": new_end.isoformat()},
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 409

tests.name: test_submit_leave_request_minimum_1_business_day_accepted
preconditions: User is authenticated as full-time employee
No overlapping leave requests exist for the selected single-day window
actions: Navigate to /leave-requests/new
Fill start_date with next_monday() business date
Fill end_date with the same date as start_date (1 business day)
Submit the form
expected: HTTP 201 or redirect to confirmation page
Leave request created with duration=1 and status=pending
trace: R-WEB-057: lower boundary of 1 business day minimum
R-WEB-057: BVA lower boundary on valid range
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_submit_leave_request_minimum_1_business_day_accepted(
    authenticated_page,
    api_client,
    smtp_stub,
    delete_leave_on_teardown,
):
    single_day = <helper_fn>.next_business_day(n=1)
    page = authenticated_page
    page.goto("/leave-requests/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='start-date']", single_day.isoformat())
    page.fill("[data-testid='end-date']", single_day.isoformat())
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-leave']")
    page.wait_for_url("**/leave-requests/**")

    resp = api_client.get("/api/leave-requests",
                          params={"start": single_day, "end": single_day})
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    records = resp.json()["data"]
    assert len(records) == 1
    leave = records[0]
    delete_leave_on_teardown(leave["id"])

    assert leave["business_days"] == 1
    assert leave["status"] == "pending"
    assert <helper_fn>.manager_notification_exists(leave["id"], api_client)
